args.code:
import pandas as pd

businesses_la = locals()['var_function-call-9125635834358773427']
reviews_la = locals()['var_function-call-4317633741530702780']

df_businesses = pd.DataFrame(businesses_la)
df_reviews = pd.DataFrame(reviews_la)
df_reviews['rating'] = df_reviews['rating'].astype(int)

average_ratings = df_reviews.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)

merged_df = pd.merge(df_businesses, average_ratings, on='gmap_id')

sorted_businesses = merged_df.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False)
top_5_businesses = sorted_businesses.head(5)

result = top_5_businesses[['name', 'average_rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)
